description: Battery cells failing thermal runaway test under load
root_cause: Faulty cathode material from sub-supplier
corrective_action: Supplier replaced cathode source and added incoming inspection

description: BMS communication dropout during charge cycle
root_cause: Firmware version mismatch in BMS controller
corrective_action: Firmware update applied to all units

description: Scratched battery casing on delivery
root_cause: Inadequate packaging during transit
corrective_action: Packaging redesigned with foam inserts

description: Motor bearing failure at 500h runtime test
root_cause: Bearing tolerance out of spec from heat treatment
corrective_action: Heat treatment process recalibrated

description: Motor output 12% below rated 750W specification
root_cause: Winding insulation degradation from humidity exposure
corrective_action: Under investigation — humidity control being added

description: Controller intermittent reset under vibration
root_cause: Loose solder joint on main PCB
corrective_action: Wave soldering parameters adjusted

description: Weld crack detected at head tube junction
root_cause: Welding temperature too low for 6061-T6 alloy
corrective_action: Welding procedure under review — all frames from batch quarantined

description: Paint adhesion failure on downtube
root_cause: Surface prep skipped before powder coating
corrective_action: Surface prep step added to QC checklist

description: Display backlight flickering in cold temperatures
root_cause: LCD driver IC thermal compensation fault
corrective_action: Replacement IC being evaluated

description: Brake caliper piston seal leak under pressure
root_cause: Seal material incompatible with new brake fluid formula
corrective_action: Seal material changed to EPDM compound

description: Spoke tension inconsistency across wheel set
root_cause: Automated tensioning machine calibration drift
corrective_action: Machine recalibrated and daily checks added

description: BMS over-voltage protection triggering prematurely
root_cause: Voltage reference resistor tolerance too wide
corrective_action: Tighter tolerance resistors specified

description: Hub motor slight vibration at high RPM
root_cause: Rotor magnet alignment 0.3mm off-center
corrective_action: Alignment jig being redesigned

description: Wiring harness connector corrosion after salt spray test
root_cause: Connector plating thickness below spec
corrective_action: Plating process upgraded to mil-spec

description: Rim anodizing color inconsistency between batches
root_cause: Anodizing bath chemistry drift
corrective_action: Bath monitoring system being installed

description: Charging port cover latch weak spring tension
root_cause: Spring wire gauge undersized
corrective_action: Spring gauge increased from 0.5mm to 0.7mm

description: Torque sensor signal noise causing pedal assist jitter
root_cause: EMI shielding insufficient near motor
corrective_action: Added ferrite cores and shielded cable

description: Carbon fiber delamination at bottom bracket shell
root_cause: Autoclave cure cycle temperature profile incorrect
corrective_action: Full batch recalled — cure cycle being revalidated

description: Display touch response lag in rain conditions
root_cause: Capacitive touch calibration not accounting for water
corrective_action: Touch algorithm updated for wet conditions

description: Tire sidewall cracking after UV exposure test
root_cause: Rubber compound UV stabilizer insufficient
corrective_action: New UV stabilizer formulation being tested
